display.purpose: Hero headline only. Max 920px wide, tight letter-spacing.

body.purpose: Paragraph text. Capped at 65-75ch on prose sections.

shadows.name: shadow-xl
shadows.purpose: Structural separation (whatsapp float hover, lightbox container).

motion.name: ease-out-expo
motion.purpose: Default easing for all transitions and animations.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main CTA on light backgrounds. Cream fill on Deep Forest. Used for WhatsApp booking.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 10px; background: #f0eadc; color: #071710; padding: 18px 28px; border: 1px solid #f0eadc; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; font-size: 0.75rem; cursor: pointer; position: relative; overflow: hidden; transition: 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-primary::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: #fff; transform: scaleY(0); transform-origin: bottom; transition: 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); z-index: 0; } .ds-btn-primary:hover::before { transform: scaleY(1); } .ds-btn-primary span { position: relative; z-index: 1; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-3px); box-shadow: 0 12px 28px -8px rgba(0,0,0,0.3); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary CTA on dark backgrounds. Transparent with white border.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 10px; background: transparent; color: #fff; padding: 18px 28px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.35); font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; font-size: 0.75rem; cursor: pointer; position: relative; overflow: hidden; transition: 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); transform: scaleY(0); transform-origin: bottom; transition: 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); z-index: 0; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover::before { transform: scaleY(1); } .ds-btn-ghost span { position: relative; z-index: 1; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { transform: translateY(-3px); }

components.name: WhatsApp Float
components.description: Fixed floating button for instant WhatsApp booking.
components.css: .ds-whatsapp-float { position: fixed; right: 24px; bottom: 24px; z-index: 200; width: 60px; height: 60px; border-radius: 50%; display: grid; place-items: center; background: #1f4a33; color: white; box-shadow: 0 14px 35px rgba(0,0,0,0.3); transition: 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); animation: ds-pulse 3s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1) infinite; } .ds-whatsapp-float:hover { transform: scale(1.1); background: #1f4a33; box-shadow: 0 18px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.35); } @keyframes ds-pulse { 0%, 100% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(31,74,51,0.4); } 50% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 12px rgba(31,74,51,0); } } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-whatsapp-float { animation: none; } }

components.name: Service Card
components.description: Service offering card in the dark services section.
components.html:
01

Corte masculino

Do clássico ao contemporâneo, com acabamento preciso e identidade.
components.css: .ds-service-card { background: #071710; padding: 44px 36px; min-height: 280px; transition: 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-service-card:hover { background: #0c2117; } .ds-service-card > span { color: #8aa08f; font-size: 0.75rem; letter-spacing: 0.2em; } .ds-service-card h3 { font-size: 1.4rem; margin: 48px 0 14px; color: white; letter-spacing: -0.03em; } .ds-service-card p { color: #b6beb8; font-size: 0.88rem; line-height: 1.6; } .ds-service-card { border-right: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.13); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.13); }

components.name: Navigation Link
components.description: Header navigation item with underline hover effect.
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 28px; color: white; font-size: 0.73rem; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; } .ds-nav a { position: relative; padding: 4px 0; transition: 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); text-decoration: none; color: inherit; } .ds-nav a::after { content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; width: 0; height: 1px; background: #f0eadc; transition: 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-nav a:hover::after { width: 100%; }

narrative.overview: DiFaria Barber Music lives at the intersection of barber craftsmanship and musical identity. The design is confident, warm-dark, and editorial — like stepping into a vinyl-lit studio where every detail signals that this is not a barbershop, it is an experience. The deep green palette evokes forest calm and premium restraint; the cream ground keeps it approachable and tactile. Music is not a theme layered on top — it is the atmosphere the design breathes.
keyCharacteristics: Dark green as the dominant personality color, cream as the breathing room
Sans-serif throughout (Montserrat), heavy on contrast via weight and size, not color
Generous whitespace and rhythm — nothing feels crowded
The WhatsApp button is the most important element on every screen
Authentic proof (5.0 / 92 reviews) is treated as a design element, not a footnote

rules.name: The One Instrument Rule
rules.body: Montserrat carries everything. No second font, no decorative typeface. Variation comes from weight (300-800) and scale, not from introducing another voice.

rules.name: The WhatsApp Center of Gravity Rule
rules.body: Every section's visual flow terminates at a WhatsApp CTA. The floating button is the persistent anchor. Nothing competes with the booking path.

rules.name: The Skinny Line Rule
rules.body: Every structural divider is exactly 1px. The line color shifts by surface.

rules.name: The Negative Letter-Spacing Rule
rules.body: All display and heading text uses negative tracking (-0.06em to -0.03em).

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows only appear as a response to state (hover, active, modal open).

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Primary accent on less than 10% of any given screen. Rarity is the point.

dos: Do use Deep Forest (#071710) as the dominant dark surface color.
Do keep body line length between 65-75ch on prose sections.
Do use text-wrap: balance on all headings (h1-h3).
Do use the exponential ease curve cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1) for all transitions.
Do put WhatsApp CTAs in every section
Do use the hard 0px border-radius on buttons
Do keep body text contrast at minimum 4.5:1 against its background
donts: Don't use a second font family. Montserrat only
Don't add shadows to surfaces at rest
Don't put gray text on colored backgrounds
Don't use bounce or elastic easing
Don't use border-left/right greater than 1px as decorative accents
Don't use Inter, Arial (beyond fallback), or system-ui fonts
Don't use numbered section markers outside the services grid
